title: Faithfull Heavy-Duty Long Handle Scraper for Removing Wall Coverings, Wallpaper & Tiles – 150mm (6in) Blade, 600mm (24 in) Length
features: High-Carbon Steel Blade - The 150mm (6in) wide blade is made from high-carbon steel, ensuring strength and durability to tackle the toughest scraping tasks.
Extra-Long 600mm Handle - The Faithfull Heavy-Duty Scraper features a long 600mm (24 in) handle to provide extra leverage and increased efficiency for effortless scraping on tough building jobs.
Comfortable Grip - Designed with user comfort in mind, the handle features a soft-grip end and a mid-foam grip to ensure a secure, comfortable hold during extended use.

Durable Construction – This all-metal scraper has a tough and durable construction, ideal for both home improvement projects or professional renovations, providing power, precision and long-lasting use.

Versatile and Multi-Purpose - Ideal for removing textured wall coverings, vinyl wall coverings, wallpaper, tiles and other materials, this versatile scraper is an essential tool for achieving a clean and smooth surface.
description: The Faithfull Heavy-Duty All-Metal Long Handle Scraper features a 150mm wide high-carbon steel blade and is ideal for removing textured wall coverings, vinyl wall coverings, wallpaper and tiles. The 600mm extra-long handle provides more leverage for tough building jobs. The handle has a soft-grip end and mid foam grip for user comfort. Blade width: 150mm (6in) Overall length: 600mm (24in) Replacement blade code: FAISCRA150BL Pack of 5.
